title: Deliciously Roasted Australian Macadamia Nuts Skillet
description: A salty and pillowy Australian dish featuring roasted macadamia nuts, perfect for a snack or dessert. This anti-inflammatory friendly recipe is made in a cast-iron skillet.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large cast-iron skillet, heat the coconut oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped macadamia nuts to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
In a small bowl, mix together the sea salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika.
Sprinkle the salt mixture over the macadamia nuts and stir to combine.
In a small bowl, mix together the honey and water until well combined.
Pour the honey mixture over the macadamia nuts and stir to combine.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Serve the roasted macadamia nuts warm and enjoy.
